FS!QR Code provides language-independent ease of use with a simple interface and intuitive operability. By using a visual tool called a QR Code Code, we can create a sharing method that is easy for anyone to understand, regardless of language, and is expected to be used in international learning environments. You can increase students' understanding by explaining the basic operations before the class starts and letting them experience simple file-sharing. Additionally, by providing advance guidance on security precautions and proper usage, you can maintain a safe and effective learning environment.

教育現場では授業プリントや課題データをタイムリーに配布することが学習意欲の維持に: In educational settings, distributing class handouts and assignment data in a timely manner helps maintain motivation for learning. With FS!QR Code, you can generate a QR Code Code using just a browser, and students can retrieve materials by reading the code displayed on the screen by the instructor. Compared to traditional USB memory or email distribution, the distribution process is greatly simplified, and students can instantly access materials on their smartphones, creating a smooth learning environment without interrupting the flow of the class.

By incorporating FS!QR Code into educational activities, students can learn hands-on topics such as secure file-sharing, the importance of password management, and the concept of temporary data storage. This knowledge will become important skills in future work life, so we can expect practical educational effects.
